payload.answer: SQL execution disabled in debug mode; memory cards could not be retrieved. Please enable BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED to run SQL-backed retrieval.

entity_resolution.reason: SQL is disabled for debug; no memory cards were executed or read.

memory_cards.statement: Brain memory system is configured with BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=false, so SQL queries are not executed in debug mode.

details: SQL execution was disabled per current configuration.

repair_options: Set BRAIN_DEBUG_SQL_ENABLED=true to allow SQL queries in debug mode.
Provide explicit memory_card identifiers to fetch specific memory entries without SQL.
